topic: Use Claude to summarize any PDF in 30 seconds

hook.text: Stop reading 50 page PDFs like it's 2020.

segments.text: Drag any PDF into Claude and ask for the five decisions that matter.
It reads every page so you can skim only what changed.
segments.visual_prompt: Clean isometric illustration of a tall stack of paper documents compressing into a single glowing summary card, dark navy background, warm amber accent light

segments.text: Then paste the summary into your notes and you're done before the meeting starts.
segments.visual_prompt: Smooth cinematic close-up of hands typing on a laptop in a dim modern office, soft amber desk light, shallow depth of field, 4k

cta.text: Follow Build Commons for one practical AI workflow every day.

platform_captions.youtube: Summarize any PDF in 30 seconds with Claude #shorts
platform_captions.instagram: The 30-second PDF workflow nobody showed you.
